rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear header text, no associated monetary amounts.

rows.description: 1766 2do Landtax for the year fr. L. Day 1766 to L. Day 1767
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts (£7 4s 0d) as accurate. gpt-5-mini had an inaccurate description prefix and misread the shillings as '1'.
rows.english_description: Land tax for the year running from Lady Day 1766 to Lady Day 1767.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Land tax for the year running from Lady Day 1766 to Lady Day 1767, amounting to £7 4s 0d.

rows.description: July 21 2do Mr. Tonce Silversmith Ballance of a Bill
rows.notes: Visual verification. Description from gemini-flash ('July 21 2do Mr. Tonce Silversmith Ballance of a Bill') is correct. Pounds amount (£3) from gpt-5-mini is correct; gemini-flash misread '3' as '9'. Shillings and pence are consistent between both extractors. gpt-5-mini's note claiming description match is inaccurate.
rows.english_description: Final balance paid to Mr Tonce, the silversmith, for his bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Final balance paid to Mr Tonce, the silversmith, amounting to £3 9s 6d.

rows.description: 29 2do The Cooks Bill of Gandies & Due Newyears Day
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent between extractors. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description, particularly 'Gandies' and including '29 2do', is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Gardiner &c' and 'Pd'.
rows.english_description: Cook's bill for candies and provisions due for New Year's Day.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Cook's bill for candies and provisions due for New Year's Day, amounting to £19 11s 0d.

rows.description: 30 2do Landtax from L. Day 1767 to L. Day 1768
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and pence value (£5 8s 0d) as accurate. gpt-5-mini misread pence as '6' and had an inaccurate description prefix.
rows.english_description: Land tax for the year from Lady Day 1767 to Lady Day 1768.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Land tax for the year from Lady Day 1767 to Lady Day 1768, amounting to £5 8s 0d.

rows.description: Oct-6 2do (by 2d Bray) Pavier's Bill in part—
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent between extractors. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description, including 'Oct-6 2do' and '2d' rather than 'Dr', is more accurate.
rows.english_description: Part payment of the pavior's (pavier's) bill for paving works, attended to by Thomas Bray.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment of the pavior's bill for paving works, amounting to £6 6s 0d.

rows.description: — 2do (by 2d) John Bishop for Journey to Little Tews
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent between extractors. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description, including the leading dash, '2d' not 'Dr', and 'Little Tews' not 'Settle Taxes', is more accurate.
rows.english_description: Payment to John Bishop for his journey to Little Tews.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to John Bishop for his journey to Little Tews, amounting to £0 10s 6d.

rows.notes: Consensus on whole amounts. gpt-5-mini noted an ambiguous scribble next to the pence value, which is visually confirmed as unclear and not a standard fractional notation, justifying leaving the fraction blank. Set confidence based on clear whole numbers and reasonable handling of ambiguity.
Description, shillings, and pence are consistent. Visual verification confirms pounds as '1127', matching gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misread the leading '1' and extracted '127'.
Amounts are consistent between extractors. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's spelling of 'praecedentis' (with 'ae' ligature) is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'precedentis'.

Description, shillings, and pence are consistent. Visual verification confirms pounds as '1169', matching gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini noted ambiguity and attempted arithmetic validation; however, its previous reading for row 12 was incorrect (£127 instead of £1127). With the correct previous row amounts (£1127 + £42), the sum is £1169, confirming gemini-flash's visual reading.

Description, shillings, and pence_whole are consistent. Visual verification confirms pounds as '917' (gpt-5-mini misread the '1') and a clear '3/4' fraction, matching gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini's assessment of the fraction as ambiguous is contradicted by visual evidence.
Amounts and fraction are consistent between extractors. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's spelling of '2ndo' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's '2do'.
Row type and amounts are consistent. Visual verification confirms the trailing period in gemini-flash's description is present in the image, unlike gpt-5-mini's.
Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description ('Computus comprobatus' and 'Praesentes' with an 'ae' ligature) as accurate. gpt-5-mini misread as 'Computu computatus' and 'Presentes'.
Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description ('Jesper' with 'e' and 'Rectorem') as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Jasper' and 'Rectoriem'.

Visual verification. 'Thomas Bray' is clear. For the title, gemini-flash's 'Subirectorem' with a note about a possible stylized 'Subrectorem' with an elongated 'i' seems more plausible than gpt-5-mini's 'Subscriptorum', aligning with the document's handwriting style.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear header text.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description ('Joannem Jarrande') as accurate. gpt-5-mini's interpretation of the given name ('Joannm') and surname ('Sarrade') were incorrect despite its good note on overall stylization.
Row type and amounts are consistent. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description (no dash between 'Richards' and 'B.A.') as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's.
